metadata.title: 2026 World Cup GIS Experience | SportKorner
metadata.description: Interactive stadium mapping and geospatial analytics for the 2026 World Cup.

WorldCup.gisDescription: Explore every host city, stadium metric, and logistical hub using our proprietary ArcGIS mapping solution.
WorldCup.clickVenues: Select individual markers to view stadium capacity, weather, and altitude data.
WorldCup.viewTeamInfo: Track team training camps and regional logistics across North America.
WorldCup.realTimeSchedules: Filter map layers by match dates to see venue availability.
WorldCup.mobileDisclaimer: * Optimal functionality requires a desktop resolution.
WorldCup.launchAppDesc: Open our standalone geospatial application to track tournament stadium telemetry, transit systems, and team dynamics.
WorldCup.subdomainNotice: This experience is hosted on a separate subdomain to ensure optimal performance and security for our users. You will be redirected to a dedicated environment where you can explore the World Cup GIS data without any interruptions.
